metadata.label: gen2/Fireblocks-SRE
metadata.title: Site Reliability Engineer
metadata.team_direction: Fireblocks is a leader in providing secure solutions for digital assets and blockchain technology

portfolio_review.title: Site Reliability Engineer
revision_priority: 补一条明确指向 Fireblocks 业务语境的安全/高可用基础设施叙事，避免简历看起来只是通用后端与平台经验。
在 DiDi 和 TikTok 的角色说明中再补 scope 限定语，降低“分析岗却承担工程 ownership”带来的可信度追问。

findings.issue: 首句以“Transitioning from data analysis to software engineering”开场，首屏先传递转向状态，而不是直接给出当前目标角色和领域锚点，削弱了 SRE/backend 画像。
findings.fix: 把首句改成直接的角色方向+领域信号，例如“Security-focused backend/SRE engineer with 3+ years building Python/Java/Go services and platform tooling”；将“transitioning”移到后半句或删掉。

findings.issue: 简历叙事能说明你做过 security、platform ops 和内部工具，但没有把这些经历明确桥接到 Fireblocks 这类“secure digital assets / blockchain infrastructure”场景，HR 需要额外猜测迁移逻辑。
findings.fix: 补一条桥接句，明确你做的是 security-sensitive、高完整性、强审计/强发布控制的基础设施或内部系统；把这种经验和目标岗位的安全平台职责直接连起来。

findings.issue: 最新且最相关的经历几乎全部用百分比改善讲结果，没有 Tier 1 规模/范围信号；对 senior SRE 来说，更像局部优化清单，而不是平台级影响。
findings.fix: 保留百分比结果的同时，至少补一条规模/ownership 信息，例如覆盖多少内部用户、多少服务、多少告警、多少每周发布、多少工作流或多少团队；用一个明确的 scope bullet 抬高首屏可信度。

revision_priority: [MUST] 把 Summary 第一条改成直接的 SRE/backend/security 角色锚点，删除或后移“transitioning from data analysis”的叙事。
[MUST] 增加一条明确桥接 Fireblocks 目标场景的句子，说明你做的是 security-sensitive / high-integrity infra、审计化发布或 incident response，而不是泛化的后台开发。
[MUST] 在 TikTok 段补一个 Tier 1 规模或 ownership 信号，避免整段只剩百分比优化。
[SHOULD] 如果 DiDi / Temu 里有真实 scope 数据，也用同样方式补一条，增强 senior SRE 的平台深度。
raw_json.revision_instructions: [MUST] Rewrite Professional Summary sentence 1 to lead with the target role, not the transition. Example: “Security-focused backend/SRE engineer with 3+ years building Python/Java/Go services and platform tooling...” Move or remove “transitioning from data analysis.” [MUST] Add one explicit bridge to Fireblocks’ secure digital-asset environment in Summary or the first relevant bullet, using truthful language about security-sensitive infra, access-controlled tooling, release hardening, or incident response. [MUST] Replace one percentage-only TikTok bullet with a scope/ownership bullet that states who or what was impacted (services, internal users, alerts, releases, or workflows). [SHOULD] If you have concrete scope numbers for DiDi/Temu, add one more Tier 1-style signal there as well.
